location: Starting weapon (x2) of the Warrior class. If playing another class, buy it from the Twin Maiden Husks at the Roundtable Hold, or farm it as a rare drop from Scimitar-and-shield Skeletons in various catacombs.
tactics: Warrior-class characters already start with two Scimitars — no travel needed
Otherwise, once you can access Roundtable Hold, find the Twin Maiden Husks shop in the alcove near Corhyn and buy it for 600 runes
It's also a low-odds (~2%) drop from Scimitar-and-Iron-Roundshield Skeletons in catacombs such as Deathtouched Catacombs, if you'd rather farm than buy
Twin Maiden Husks are the only fixed seller of this weapon — don't mix them up with other traveling merchants around the map
lore: A compact, single-edged curved sword suited to quick slashing strikes; like many blades of its kind it cuts cleanly through flesh but struggles against heavy armor or tough scaled hide.

builds.name: Lightweight early Dexterity pick
builds.why: One of the lightest curved swords with the lowest Strength requirement (7) in its class, making it an efficient low-investment weapon for a fast, aggressive build.
